title: rosa × schleicheri var. subinermis
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. subinermis, also known as Schleicher's rose or Rosa subinermis, is a deciduous shrub species in the rose family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and thornless branches. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa × schleicheri var. subinermis include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting relaxation. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
